title: Vietnamese-Style Chicken and Hue Bun
description: Inspired by Italian flavors with a Vietnamese twist, this dish combines tender chicken with fresh herbs and a crispy bun.

ingredients.name: tender
ingredients.amount: 1/4 cup chopped fresh herbs (such as parsley or basil)

instructions: Season chicken with salt and pepper.
Heat buttery in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake until the chicken is cooked through, about 15-20 minutes.
Meanwhile, toast the hue bun in the oven for 2-3 minutes, or until crispy.
Assemble the dish by slicing the chicken and serving it on top of the toasted hue bun.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs and a sprinkle of tender.
